overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a gothic horror action game showing a hunter character in a long coat navigating a foggy Victorian city street at night. The character walks along wet stone pathways, performs a combat dodge roll at an intersection, and approaches an ornate iron gate as an emergency vehicle passes by with flashing lights.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet stone sidewalk toward an intersection, passing a mailbox and street tree

entered.detail: dark metal mailbox on the sidewalk edge
multi-story brick building with illuminated windows
tall stone wall running along the right side of the path
leafless tree silhouetted against the foggy sky
red octagonal stop sign at the approaching intersection
decorative wrought iron gate with stone pillars visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet stone sidewalk in a foggy gothic city at night. Street lamps cast warm light on the red brick buildings to the left and a tall stone wall to the right. The character approaches an intersection marked by a stop sign, with an ornate iron gate visible ahead.

events.description: character performs a combat dodge roll while crossing the cobblestone intersection

agents.ego_description: dodging across the wet cobblestone intersection with weapon drawn, moving toward the ornate gate

entered.detail: tall dark stone building with multiple chimneys and warm window lights
victorian-style street lamp casting bright light on the fog
black iron fence running along the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character enters the open cobblestone intersection and executes a dodge roll at 16 seconds. The ground transitions from paved sidewalk to wet cobblestones. A tall gothic tower rises on the right with illuminated windows, while the ornate iron gate ahead grows larger in the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching ornate iron gate with emergency vehicle

events.description: ambulance with flashing red lights appears parked on the left side of the cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: approaching the ornate iron gate while passing the emergency vehicle on the left

notable_agents.action: ambulance with flashing lights stationary on the left side of the road

entered.detail: white emergency vehicle with flashing red rear lights

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the large ornate iron gate at the end of the street. An ambulance with flashing red lights is parked on the left side of the cobblestone road. The tall gothic building remains prominent on the right as the character nears the gate structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy gothic city street that transitions from a narrow sidewalk into a wide, open intersection. It begins with the character walking along a wet stone sidewalk flanked by red brick buildings and a tall stone wall under the warm glow of street lamps. As the character reaches an intersection, the ground shifts from paved sidewalk to wet cobblestones, where the character executes a dodge roll while a tall gothic tower with illuminated windows rises into view on the right. The scene then expands toward a large ornate iron gate at the end of the road, passing an ambulance with flashing red lights parked on the left. Finally, the camera closes in on the gate structure as the imposing gothic architecture continues to dominate the skyline.
